form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on April 16 over 411m at Casino behind Phantom Juliet beaten 7 lengths (24.61). Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and never headed, leading throughout to win by 0.8 lengths (20.23) over 350m at this track. With a good start will take catching off the low draw.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Casino to win by 3.5 lengths in 17.01, beating Words Of Wisdom. Last start finished 4th over 300m at Casino beaten 2.75 lengths (17.36) behind Hi Ellen in a Grade 5 on April 9. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished 4th over 411m at Casino beaten 6 lengths (23.75) behind Kooringa Millie in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.
